name: dotnetExec
description: Load or run .NET assemblies. Load inputs are resolved from TeamServer Tools.

beacon_hash.description: Full beacon hash identifying the session that should execute the command.

listener_hash.description: Full listener hash for the target beacon session.

module_name.description: Short module name used for loaded assemblies, or the loaded module to run.

assembly_artifact.description: Assembly tool artifact name or id for load. Required for action load.

type_or_method.description: Fully-qualified type name for DLL load, or method name for runDll.
